note: Clinical content (CLAUDE.md §9, issue #104) — PLACEHOLDER COPY pending advisor sign-off, see docs/clinical-review/2026-07-11-ai-results-summary.md. section_headings label the four parts of the LLM-generated narrative on the Results screen; framing_note is the fixed sentence separating this AI read from the official deterministic result above it (never combined, never a second finding). framing_note: This is a separate, AI-generated read of your typed answers — not part of your official results above, and not a second finding to combine with them. It's here as another way to reflect on what you shared.
